decisions.reason: Moves 'environment would win out' to complete the mutation sentence.
Moves 'the world is a mystery' after the dangling 'And' to complete the sentence.
Moves the legitimacy clause after 'has reason' to complete the colonization sentence.
Moves 'strong survive...' after the dangling article 'the' to complete the sentence.
Moves 'a monkey...' to complete 'we are just a monkey'.
Moves the 'of climate change...' phrase to complete the because-clause.
Moves 'I said...' after 'And as' to complete the sentence.
Moves 'these people...' after 'Because for' to complete the explanation.
Moves 'all life on earth' to complete 'were the basis for all life on earth'.
Moves 'together' to complete 'everything's connected together'.
Moves 'we sing...' after 'the same thing when' to complete the parallel construction.
Moves 'a corruption' to complete the writing-is-corruption sentence.
Moves 'to use symbols...' after 'you have' to complete the clause.
Moves 'underlying soul of reality' after the dangling phrase 'or the'.
Moves the tradition clause to complete 'communities of today that hold to this tradition'.
Moves 'watching everyone' to complete the horse-watching sentence.
Moves 'days and days...' to complete the documentary-team sentence.
Moves 'help' to complete 'get professional help'.
Moves 'we truly love someone' to complete the conditional phrase.
Moves 'let each other down' to complete 'you don't want to let each other down'.
Moves 'warriors' to complete 'the greatest warriors'.
Moves 'create a movie' after 'was able to' to complete the sentence.
Moves 'do, you'll always find a way' to complete the if-clause.
Moves the final 'and on' to complete the repeated phrase.
Moves 'go to church and pray' to complete the spiritual-desire sentence.
Moves the Alzheimer's clause to complete 'these people with Alzheimer's...'.
Moves 'who we are' to complete the brainwashing sentence.
Moves 'up and...' to complete 'go beat people up...'.
Moves 'die anyway' to complete 'you're going to die anyway'.
Moves the trailing starter 'But back then, they' to join its predicate in the next segment.
Moves 'celebrate those things' to complete 'they did celebrate those things'.
Moves 'want them' to complete 'because we don't want them'.
Moves 'much' to complete 'watch television too much'.
Moves 'right, okay' to complete the closing 'All right, okay'.
